Semantic Colors

Status Signals · 4 families · 4 steps each

Success
success-50 #ECFDF5
success-100 #D1FAE5
success-500 #10B981
success-700 #047857
Warning
warning-50 #FFFBEB
warning-100 #FEF3C7
warning-500 #F59E0B
warning-700 #B45309
Danger
danger-50 #FEF2F2
danger-100 #FEE2E2
danger-500 #EF4444
danger-700 #B91C1C
Info
info-50 #EFF6FF
info-100 #DBEAFE
info-500 #3B82F6
info-700 #1D4ED8
